title: Socially-Reasonable Humanoid Gestures
abstract: Collected dataset of human social gestures and retargeted to Unitree G1 humanoid robot. Utilized an LLM as a high-level social task planner to sequence retargeted motions.

title: Learning Humanoid Motion Priors Online
venue: Georgia Tech, CS 7648 Interaction Robot Learning
abstract: Leveraged VLMs to generate high-level task plans from natural language goals, and efficiently request one-shot demonstrations when the robot's skill library is insufficient.

title: Human-Robot 5-DoF Manipulator
abstract: 5-DOF manipulator to play Carrom in a dynamic environment with human opponents.

title: Exploration-based Planner
abstract: Information-based exploration of an unknown space with probabilistic sensors.

title: Hierarchical Quadruped Planner
abstract: Wrote hierarchical A* planner for quadrupedal locomotion on diverse terrains.

title: Wikipedia Agent
abstract: Sub-agents for retrieval augmented generation. Improved answer accuracy and speed over baselines.

title: AI Diagnostician
abstract: Trained large vision models to predict pathologies from "CheXpert" chest X-rays.

title: Graph Search for Replanning
abstract: Compared efficiency of D* from A* and Dijkstra for replanning on large graphs.

title: Quadruped Kinematics
abstract: Wrote forward/inverse kinematics to simulate a quadrupedal robot designed in Solidworks.

title: Mobile Robotics
abstract: Implemented localization, obstacle avoidance, and odometry algorithms on hardware.
